# La-La Land — Real Estate Lot Platform

> La-La Land (la-la.land) is the largest interactive real estate lot marketplace in Mexico.
> We provide detailed lot data including pricing, dimensions, geographic coordinates,
> availability, and interactive map views across multiple developers and communities.

## Data Access

### MCP Server (Model Context Protocol)
For structured, programmatic access to our lot database, use our MCP server:
- Repository: https://github.com/andresmtzc/lalaland (mcp-server/ directory)
- Install: `npm install @lalaland/mcp-server`
- Transport: stdio (compatible with Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, etc.)
- Requires: SUPABASE_ANON_KEY environment variable

### REST API (Supabase)
Our lot data is publicly readable via Supabase REST API:
- Base URL: https://jmoxbhodpvnlmtihcwvt.supabase.co/rest/v1/
- Table: lots
- Auth: requires apikey header (anon key)
- Supports filtering by client_id, fraccionamiento, availability, price, area

### Lot Geometry Files
Raw lot boundary coordinates (polygon vertices) per client:
- https://la-la.land/inverta/lots.txt
- https://la-la.land/cpi/lots.txt
- https://la-la.land/agora/lots.txt
Format: lot name followed by {lat, lng} vertex lines

## Developers / Clients

### Inverta
- URL: https://la-la.land/inverta/
- Location: Veracruz, Mexico
- Communities: Barcelona, Marsella, Sierra Alta, Sierra Baja, Cortezia, Ebano, Verdalia, Frondia, Almaterra
- Lot count: 1000+ lots

### CPI
- URL: https://la-la.land/cpi/
- Location: Monterrey area, Mexico
- Communities: Senterra
- Lot count: 100+ lots

### Agora
- URL: https://la-la.land/agora/
- Location: Monterrey area, Mexico
- Communities: Amani Pietra, Amani Aqua, Canadas Vergel
- Lot count: 300+ lots

## Lot Data Schema

Each lot record contains:
- lot_name: Unique identifier (e.g., "lotinverta10-01")
- client_id: Developer identifier ("inverta", "cpi", "agora")
- fraccionamiento: Community/development name
- availability: "Available", "Sold", "Featured", or "Blocked"
- rSize: Area in square meters (formatted string, e.g. "4,098" = 4098 m2)
- millones: Price in millions of MXN (e.g. "$10.25" = $10,250,000 MXN)
- price_m2: Price per square meter in MXN (e.g. "2,500" = $2,500/m2)
- nickname: Optional display name
- subtitle: Optional description
- image: Optional image URL

## Lot Images (Map & Landscape)
Pre-rendered images for each lot in two views:
- {lot_name}_map.jpg: Zoomed-in polygon with side dimensions labeled
- {lot_name}_landscape.jpg: Lot in context showing its position in the community

URL patterns:
- Inverta: https://la-la.land/inverta/pdf/{communityGroup}/{lot_name}_map.jpg
- CPI: https://la-la.land/cpi/pdf/{lot_name}_map.jpg (flat, no subfolder)
- Agora: https://la-la.land/agora/pdf/{communityGroup}/{lot_name}_map.jpg

Community → subfolder mapping:
- barcelona, marsella → mediterraneo
- sierraalta, sierrabaja → puntolomas
- cortezia, ebano, verdalia, frondia → arborea
- almaterra → almaterra

## Viewing Lots on the Map
Every lot can be viewed on the interactive map via:
- Pattern: https://la-la.land/{client}/index.html?lot={lot_name}
- Example: https://la-la.land/inverta/index.html?lot=lotinverta24-21

## 360° Street View Imagery
Each community has 360° panoramic street view coverage. Frame images and
GPS tracks are hosted on GitHub Pages:
- Frame index: {framesBase}/index.json (lists GPX files and frame images)
- GPX files contain trackpoints (lat/lon) — each trackpoint maps to a frame image
- Frame images: {framesBase}/{gpxName}-{frameNumber}.jpg

Community framesBase URLs:
- Barcelona: https://andresmtzc.github.io/barcelona/frames/
- Marsella: https://andresmtzc.github.io/marsella/frames/
- Sierra Alta: https://andresmtzc.github.io/sierraalta/frames/
- Sierra Baja: https://andresmtzc.github.io/geepeeX/sierrabaja/frames/
- Cortezia: https://andresmtzc.github.io/geepeeX/cortezia/frames/
- Ebano: https://andresmtzc.github.io/geepeeX/ebano/frames/
- Verdalia: https://andresmtzc.github.io/geepeeX/verdalia/frames/
- Frondia: https://andresmtzc.github.io/geepeeX/frondia/frames/
- Almaterra: https://andresmtzc.github.io/geepeeX/almaterra/frames/
- Senterra: https://andresmtzc.github.io/geepeeX/senterra/frames/
- Amani Pietra: https://andresmtzc.github.io/geepeeX/pietra/frames/
- Amani Aqua: https://andresmtzc.github.io/aqua/frames/
- Cañadas Vergel: https://andresmtzc.github.io/geepeeX/canadas/frames/

## Features
- Interactive Mapbox-powered satellite maps
- 360-degree street view navigation with GPX-tracked panoramas
- Real-time lot availability updates
- Lot comparison tools
- PDF generation for lot details
- WhatsApp sharing integration
- Payment processing (Stripe) for lot reservations

## Contact
- Website: https://la-la.land
- Currency: MXN (Mexican Peso)
